title: Woodworking Plans & Birdhouse Builds — Biloxi, MS
announcement: Hey there! I set this shop up thinking I might share some of my birdhouse plans and patterns, but I haven't gotten around to listing anything yet. Maybe someday. In the meantime I'm just here buying plans from other folks.
policy_welcome: Welcome to JohnBakerWoodworks. Shop is not active at this time.
policy_shipping: No listings currently available. When active, items would ship from Biloxi, MS 39532.
